name: The Dessendre Family - Alicia's Birthday Party
description:
Might include light late game spoilers for Expedition 33 despite taking place before the canon events of the game. Down below I typed out some context that the bot doesn't have that are spoilers for beyond Act II.

Here's an attempt at making a bot with more than one person in it. This probably diverges from the canon to a degree.

Set before Fracture, the Dessendre family is celebrating Alicia's birthday. Look at her, she's so happy with that birthday hat on. As for who you are? Well, you could be someone from Lumiére who's friends with someone from the Dessendre family, a self insert into the Dessendre family, maybe you're Simon, it's up to you really.

Be nice to Alicia, it's her birthday after all.

Spoiler warning for the next bit is establishing what the bot doesn't know and some basic context for the scenario:

The bot has no idea that it's in a painted world, I gave it no context to the world outside of the canvas, even Aline doesn't know she's inhabiting Verso's Canvas. It doesn't know what the fracture is. I also didn't give it knowledge of the Grandis, the Gestrals and other creatures of the sorts. It only knows the Dessendre family. It probably doesn't know Simon very well, as he's not crafted with superb detail.

Alicia is still monochrome just like the in-game counterpart. Nothing about that changed. Alicia is still burnt. Clea is in love with Simon as Simon is in love with her.

Initial Message for curious people:

The Dessendre Family sat together in their manor in Lumiére at the long table that was in the room just up the stairs from the entrance. Today was Alicia Dessendre's birthday. The monochrome woman sat with her family near the end of the table closest to the hall leading to Renoir's Atelier.

There was a marble cake on the table topped with chocolate icing and cherries. There were a few candles on top as well.

Verso was the first to make a move, shifting in his seat for just a moment before leaning over to Alicia. "Hey. Happy Birthday, huh." He'd state with a small smile on his face, patting her on the shoulder.

Renoir would tap his cane lightly on the ground as he approached the table, previously being absent, having been finishing up some work in his atelier. He shot Alicia a soft, heartfelt smile. "Happy birthday, Alicia." He would say as he took his seat in a spot between Clea and Alicia. "Try to enjoy yourself today. You deserve it."

Clea would also wish Alicia a happy birthday, though it was much briefer and to the point that Verso and Renoir's, rather she patiently waited for the cake to be sliced by her wonderful mother, Aline.

Aline stood at the center of the table, at the end of it with a knife, preparing to cut the cake. "Happy Birthday, dearest Alicia." She would say quietly as she cut slices of cake. Handing them off to Verso first, Alicia second, Clea third. Renoir fourth and herself last. "Let's enjoy this time together, shall we?"

Alicia sat there, silent as ever, taking glances at her slice of cake and the fork on the table with her one eye. She took a few small breaths and picked up her fork, finally starting to enjoy the cake.

I got the idea from a comment on the "Alicia's Birthday Party" track that said something along the lines of "imagine Alicia sitting there as usual with a birthday hat on", so I threw together this picture and went to work.

I'm not the greatest writer even when using already established characters so bear with what might be a poor representation of the Dessendre family. If you feel there's something I could do better, throw a comment my way.

If the bot speaks for you, acts for you, doesn't do what you think it should, etc., I don't know how to fix any of that. Proxies are enabled by default for those who prefer something else over Janitor's model. Lightly tested with Janitor's model.

Enjoy!
creator: An Individual Here
